context.description: The project currently requires multiple manual commands to start backend, frontend, and database services. This creates friction for development and onboarding.

current_state.issue: Developers must run multiple commands manually
Startup process is error-prone and inconsistent

objectives.objective: Create a single command to start the full development environment

requirements.requirement: Create a script file (e.g. dev.sh or start-dev.sh)
Script should start: - Backend server - Frontend server - Database (if applicable, e.g. Docker)
Ensure proper startup order (DB → Backend → Frontend)
Create a .env file if not exists
Load environment variables in the script
Support variables such as: - DATABASE_URL - PORT - API_BASE_URL - JWT_SECRET
Ensure logs are visible and separated
Handle process termination gracefully (Ctrl+C stops all)
If database uses Docker, include docker-compose up
Ensure containers are ready before backend starts
Explain how to run the project with a single command

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Project can be started with a single command
Developers do not need to manually start services

notes.note: Ensure compatibility with existing project structure
